description_long: This is a small, round, hand-crafted terracotta plant pot with a rustic, reddish-brown surface and visible signs of age and wear. The pot features a slightly uneven rim and a bulbous body, adorned with painted geometric patterns in black, white, and ochre hues, including zigzag and dotted motifs. A protruding spout or handle is present on one side, suggesting a functional or decorative purpose. The interior is unglazed and shows a rough, earthy texture, consistent with traditional pottery techniques. The exterior surface is matte and somewhat rough, with visible brushstrokes and natural imperfections. This pot would be well-suited for holding a small plant and adds a touch of artisanal charm to any setting.
description: A rustic, hand-painted terracotta plant pot with geometric patterns and a protruding spout, featuring a rough, matte finish and earthy tones.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open mouth, uneven rim, and decorative band with zigzag and dot patterns.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the protruding spout or handle and the continuation of the painted geometric band.
description_view_2: Back view displays the spout more centrally and reveals the full circumference of the decorative motif.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the spout from a different angle and the pot's rounded profile with visible patterning.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used in rustic gardens or patios for decorative planting
attribute_decorative_pattern: painted geometric zigzag and dot motifs
